ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who uploaded the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "version" TEXT /* Current version of the dataset */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the dataset (e.g., health, social media, economics) */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for advanced search and filtering */,
  "total_views" INTEGER /* Total number of views the dataset has received */,
  "total_downloads" INTEGER /* Total number of downloads the dataset has received */,
  "last_accessed" TEXT /* Last date the dataset was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the variable belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the variable */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variable */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of variable (e.g., Moral, Contextual) */,
  "estimate" REAL /* Estimate of the variable */,
  "se" REAL /* Standard error of the variable */,
  "t_value" REAL /* t-value of the variable */,
  "p_value" REAL /* p-value of the variable */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the variable */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the variable */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the variable */,
  "mean_value" REAL /* Mean value of the variable */,
  "median_value" REAL /* Median value of the variable */,
  "std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of the variable */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the variable (e.g., numerical, categorical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variables_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the author */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID of the author for unique identification */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the author */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the author */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the author's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_papers" (
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research paper */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the research paper */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the research paper */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the paper was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the paper was published */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the research paper */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the research paper */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for advanced search and filtering */,
  "total_citations" INTEGER /* Total number of citations the paper has received */,
  "pdf_url" TEXT /* URL of the PDF version of the paper */,
  "doi_url" TEXT /* URL of the DOI */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_paper_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset linked to the paper */,
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research paper linked to the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the link between the dataset and the paper */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_paper_links_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("paper_id") REFERENCES research_papers ("paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_paper_links_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID of the user for unique identification */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is the default role for new users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the user was assigned the role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the user's role ends (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset version */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset version was uploaded */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog of changes made in the version */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is the current version of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
